For me, I had an initial idea about the Geekbench setup, and I proceeded with that approach.

At the beginning, I was not very confident about the architecture.

As I spent more time exploring the flow and understanding the components, things became clearer.

I am still exploring how Geekbench and Geekbench AI can be used separately for our use case in the next steps.

From where I am right now, I try to look as far as possible toward the goal, which helps in guiding the work.

I kept the end goal in mind while working through it.

Overall, it has been a good learning process for me.

Going forward, we can continue looking for better approaches as we gain more clarity.
